entity.label: Mattaniah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Levite who assisted in purifying the temple at the reformation under Hezekiah (2 Chr. 29:13).

verses.text: And of the sons of Elizaphan; Shimri, and Jeiel: and of the sons of Asaph; Zechariah, and Mattaniah:
